meta.title: The crazy firepower in American jets
meta.description:
We're trying something a little different today with a short, unscripted video from Alex Hollings. This time, Alex covers the massive scale of the rounds fired by weapon systems like the M61 Vulcan in many American fighters and the massive GAU-8 carried by the legendary A-10 Thunderbolt II. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
